architecture_fit.note: Exact softmax(QKᵀ/√d)·V as a single attention core, no MLP/residual — the minimal delta the synthetic Q/K/V task warrants.

baseline_comparison.note: Beyond the built-in uniform strawman, runs three component knock-outs (no_dot, no_scale, no_softmax) all collapsing toward/past baseline.

faithfulness.note: Synthetic so fidelity is by-construction; README says so explicitly and adds measurable ablations as the activation-patching analogue.

operating_range.note: Machine-precision fidelity holds across the full 8→128 sweep (worst cos 0.99999), but span is only ~1.2 orders and not extended.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Entire mechanism is hand-written exact attention with no training — strong direct evidence of understanding.

visual_judgement.note: Hero ablation bar chart (one green vs three red) plus robustness curve and attention heatmap make the causal claim legible at a glance.

visualisation_rationale.note: README ties each panel to the goal: fidelity-per-variant for causality, cos-vs-seqlen for robustness, heatmap for weight structure.

notes: An exact hand-built scaled-dot-product circuit that reproduces the reference to machine precision (attention_fidelity ≈ 1.0, worst-case cos ≈ 0.99999) across the full sweep. Its real value-add is a clean causal ablation study — knocking out the dot product, the scale, or the softmax each collapses fidelity — paired with a legible hero bar chart and well-justified supporting views. Faithfulness is by-construction (synthetic), and the operating range is confined to the goal's fixed ~1-order sweep, which keeps it short of a flat perfect.
